plan.command: cloudflare-api-tool --env-file /path/to/your/project/.env --project-dir /path/to/your/project --output json workers logs search --account-id acc1 --error-id 0123456789abcdef --out telemetry_query.json
risk_reasons: This queries stored logs/events; results may include PII.
This writes the raw API response to a local file; results are never printed.
This is a read-like POST (no Cloudflare state changes expected).
preconditions: API token has least-privilege permissions needed for this operation.

keys_discovery.notes: Used to auto-discover the request-id key when --request-id-key is not provided.

query.notes: Uses queryId='temporary' with filters + timeframe (see OpenAPI snapshot schema).

verification_plan: Confirm output file exists and record size/sha256 locally.
notes: Results may contain PII; output is file-only and never printed.
On apply, the tool will auto-discover a request-id key via telemetry keys; it may refuse if none is found.
